ext.description: Chat with local LLMs (LM Studio / OpenAI-compatible or Ollama) inside VS Code, LM Studio style.

view.models.name: Models
config.ollama.managed.desc: Manage an embedded Ollama server: download its own Ollama binary and run it locally (independent of any system install). When off, use the Base URL below.
config.ollama.port.desc: Port for the managed Ollama server (0 = pick a free port automatically).
config.ollama.modelsPath.desc: Optional folder to store downloaded models (sets `OLLAMA_MODELS`). Empty = Ollama's default.
config.ollama.maxConcurrentDownloads.des: How many models can download at the same time (the rest queue). 2 by default.
config.tts.piperPath.desc: Path to the `piper` binary (or just `piper` if it's on your PATH). Used for the neural "Piper" voice engine. Download from https://github.com/rhasspy/piper/releases.
config.tts.piperModel.desc: Path to a Piper voice model `.onnx` file (its `.onnx.json` must sit next to it), or a voice name if using the `piper-tts` pip package (auto-downloads). Spanish voices at https://huggingface.co/rhasspy/piper-voices.
config.tts.piperSpeaker.desc: Speaker id for multi-speaker Piper models (-1 = default). Use this to pick a female speaker when a model bundles several voices.
config.tts.debug.desc: Write TTS debug traces to the console and a log file in the temp dir. Off by default.
config.language.desc: UI language for the chat editor (follows VS Code's display language when set to Automatic).
config.provider.desc: Default model backend for new chats.
config.provider.enum.openai: OpenAI-compatible endpoint (LM Studio, llama.cpp server, etc.)
config.maxTokens.desc: Maximum tokens to generate (-1 for no limit where the backend allows it).
config.openai.baseUrl.desc: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible endpoint (LM Studio uses http://localhost:1234/v1).
config.openai.apiKey.desc: API key (optional). LM Studio and most local servers don't require it.
config.ollama.baseUrl.desc: Base URL of the Ollama server.
config.gemini.apiKey.desc: Google Gemini API key (from Google AI Studio). Sent in the X-goog-api-key header.
config.gemini.baseUrl.desc: Base URL of Google's Generative Language API.
config.anthropic.apiKey.desc: Anthropic API key (console.anthropic.com). Sent in the x-api-key header.
config.anthropic.baseUrl.desc: Base URL of Anthropic's Messages API.
config.openrouter.apiKey.desc: OpenRouter API key (openrouter.ai/keys). Sent as a Bearer token.
config.openrouter.baseUrl.desc: Base URL of the OpenRouter API (OpenAI-compatible).
config.openrouter.vendors.desc: Filter OpenRouter models by vendor (the prefix before `/`). Empty = all. E.g.: `openai`, `anthropic`, `google`, `meta-llama`, `mistralai`, `deepseek`, `qwen`, `x-ai`.
config.openrouter.sort.desc: Routing preference among OpenRouter providers. Useful when enabling **tools** routes you to a slower provider: set `throughput` to pick the fastest in the compatible pool.
config.tools.maxReadBytes.desc: Maximum bytes returned by the native `fs_read` tool (the rest is truncated). Prevents dumping huge files into the model's context. An invalid value falls back to 100000.
cmd.models.openLocalModel.title: View card / open in browser
